01 — Recommendation System
IMDB Movie Recommendation System

02 — Classification
NutriClass Food Classification

A multi-class classification model that categorizes food items based on nutritional information. Includes data preprocessing, feature engineering, and evaluation using standard ML metrics.

Python Pandas Scikit-learn Classification Feature Engineering
🏆 Test Accuracy: 99.34% — Gradient Boosting

03 — Banking ML
Axis Bank Product Recommendation System

ML-based recommendation system to suggest relevant banking products using K-Means clustering for customer segmentation. Deployed on AWS with Streamlit for real-time use.

04 — Web App + Dashboard

05 — Finance & Analytics

Swiggy Restaurant Recommendation System
